trend_signal: Remote work and hybrid office trends continue to rise with tech advancements and post-pandemic shifts.
stock_safe_concept: A cozy, well-organized home office desk with a laptop, houseplants, coffee mug, and natural light from a window, no people shown.
buyer_use_cases: Website backgrounds for productivity or remote work blogs
Marketing materials for home office furniture brands
risk_notes: Ensure no visible brand logos on laptop or accessories; avoid any identifiable personal items.
score_reason: Highly versatile concept aligned with ongoing remote work trends, broad commercial appeal, and low risk.

trend_signal: Sustainability and eco-conscious lifestyles are growing consumer priorities.
topic: Eco-friendly shopping and zero waste lifestyle
stock_safe_concept: Flat lay of reusable shopping bags, glass jars filled with grains, bamboo utensils, and fresh produce on a rustic wooden surface.
visual_elements: Natural textures like wood and linen
risk_notes: No brand names or logos on products; avoid any copyrighted packaging designs.
score_reason: Strong alignment with sustainability trend and versatile for multiple green lifestyle marketing needs.

trend_signal: Health and wellness including mental health awareness is a growing content category.
stock_safe_concept: A serene indoor meditation corner with cushions, candles, a small indoor water fountain, and a potted plant, with soft natural light.
visual_elements: Soft pastel and earth tone colors
risk_notes: No visible personal items or signs; no specific symbols that could be trademarked (like certain meditation logos).
score_reason: Well-targeted to wellness trend with broad usability and minimal legal risk.

trend_signal: Technology integration in everyday life, especially smart home devices.
stock_safe_concept: A modern living room featuring a smart speaker, smart thermostat, and tablet displaying home automation app interface (generic UI), no people.
buyer_use_cases: Digital marketing campaigns for IoT products
visual_elements: Visible smart devices with generic screens
risk_notes: No visible brand logos on devices or app screens; UI design must be generic and non-infringing.
score_reason: Strong relevance to smart home trend with high commercial demand and manageable legal risk.

trend_signal: Outdoor activities and nature connection growing post-pandemic.
topic: Minimalist camping gear setup in nature
stock_safe_concept: A neatly arranged campsite with a minimalist tent, portable camping stove, backpack, and nature elements like pine trees and rocks, no people shown.
visual_elements: Clear daylight or golden hour lighting
risk_notes: No branded outdoor gear visible; avoid any copyrighted designs or logos on equipment.
score_reason: Popular outdoor lifestyle concept with strong seasonal and evergreen appeal, moderate risk.
